hero.desc_p1: Security is not an operational expense; it is the investment that shields the fulfillment of your organizational goals. We redesign your strategy with a High Management vision.

ticker.message: Accessing our consulting grants you a customized integral security manager for your business or management, SHIELDTRACE PSIM, Free for 4 months!

technology.title: What is SHIELDTRACE PSIM?
technology.psim_def: PSIM (Physical Security Information Management): It is a software platform that integrates multiple unconnected security devices, controlling them through a comprehensive and intelligent user interface.
technology.concept_desc: Traditional consulting stops at reports. With CSSG, we move to real execution. We combine certified experts with cutting-edge technology to respond to the pace of current threats.
haas_benefits: Zero CAPEX Investment: No upfront hardware costs.
Proactive Maintenance: Immediate replacement upon failure.
Continuous Update: You will always have the latest AI version.
Tactical Scalability: Grows according to your operational need.
technology.compliance: Management based on ISO 9001, ISO 31000 standards, and global Best Practices. Designed to empower the Security Manager or fill the void of a professional in the area, guaranteeing international-level management.
technology.accountability_note: Vital Reminder: Under our Accountability Partner methodology, our responsibility does not end until your organizational goals are 100% shielded.

questions.q: How fast is the HaaS deployment?
questions.a: After the initial audit (Phase 1), ShieldTrace hardware is delivered and configured in less than 72 business hours.

questions.q: Is it compatible with my current cameras?
questions.a: Yes. ShieldTrace PSIM is agnostic; it integrates with 95% of the CCTV and access control brands on the market.

questions.q: What happens after the 4 free months?
questions.a: You can choose to maintain the service through a fixed monthly subscription or return the hardware without penalty.

questions.q: Is the consulting in-person or remote?
questions.a: Hybrid. We perform on-site technical diagnoses and strategic follow-ups via digital dashboard.
